limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

search.description: Optional. Fuzzy match against dashboard `name` and `description` using Postgres trigram word similarity (handles typos, transpositions, and prefix-as-you-type). `name` matches rank above `description` matches. Results are ordered by relevance, then pinned status, then name. When omitted, dashboards are ordered by pinned status then alphabetical name. Capped at 200 characters; longer queries return a 400 error.
